sections.sectionTitle: Masedonia gam leh Grik gamah Paul' Khualzinna

verses.text: Hih buaina thu a ven' ciangin Paul in thu um mite kaikhawmin, hanthotna kam genin amaute mangpha khak a, Masedonia gam a zuan dingin dingkhia hi
Hih gamsungah khualzinin hanthotna tampi a genkhit ciangin Grik gamah pai a
tua gamah kha thum sung a tam hi. Syria gam manawh dingin a kithawi laitakin tua gama om Jew mite in lamkalah amah a thahsawmna thu za ahih manin Masedonia gam tawn kikin khualzin ding a ngaihsun hi
Berea khuami Pirras' tapa Sopater, Thesalonika khuami Aristarkhas leh Sekundus, Derbe khuami Gaias, Timoti, leh Asia gamsung panin Tikhikas leh Trofimas-te in zong a zui uh hi
Amaute na mapai uh a, Troas khua-ah kote hong ngak uh hi
Silngo Sawhloh Anlum Pawi a ven' khit ciangin Filippi khua panin teembaw tawh ka ding uh a, ni nga khit ciangin Troas khua tungin amaute tawh ka kimu uh a, tua lai-ah nipikal khat sung ka taam uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Troas khua-ah Paul A Hawh Nunungna

verses.text: Sani nitakin an nekhawm dingin ka kikhawm uh a, a zing ciangin a dingkhia ding ahih manin Paul in a thuhilh zankim ciangdong a zomsuak hi
Ka kikhopna uh inn dawl tungnung sungah meivak tampi a kivak hi

Tawlet gei-ah Eutikhas a kici tangval khat tu a, Paul in a thugen zomzom ahih manin tua tangvalpa a ihmut suakin lusu a, a sawtna ciangin ihmusip kha-in inn dawl thumna panin leilakah a kiasuk hi. Amaute in a va phot uh ciangin amah na si khinta hi
Paul zong va kumsukin tangvalpa tungah bokin kikhuangin kawi a, “Lunghimawh kei un, hinglai hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin inn dawl tungnungah kahto kikin anlum balnenin thu um mite tawh a nekhawm hi. Zingsang khuavak dong amaute tawh thu kikum uh a, tua ciangin a dingkhia hi
Amaute in tua tangvalpa a inn-ah va kha uh a, a lungsim uh nuamkik mahmah hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Troas khua panin Miletas khua-ah Teembaw tawh Paina

verses.text: Tua ciangin Paul in, Assos khua ciangdong khe-in pai ning, ci-in ko kiangah hong gen ahih manin, Troas khua panin teembaw tuangin Assos-ah ka pai uh a, tua khua-ah Paul tawh a kituah ding ka hi uh hi
Assos khua ka tun' uh ciangin Paul in zong teembaw hong man a, Mitylene khua-ah ka paisuak uh hi
Tua panin ding leuleu-in a zing ciangin Khios tuikulh khengin Samos tuikulh ka tung uh hi. Tua panin a zing ciangin Miletas khua ka tung uh hi
Paul in Jerusalem khua-ah Pentekos Pawi hun lapnuam ahih manin Asia gamsungah ban man dingin ngaihsunlo a, Efesa khua-ah taam sawmlo hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Paul in Efesa Pawlpi Upate kiangah Thu Gen

verses.text: Paul in Miletas khua panin Efesa khua-ah thu puak a, Efesa pawlpi upate in a na dawntuahna dingin a vaikhak hi
Efesa pawlpi upate hong tun' ciangin Paul in amaute kiangah, “Asia gamsung kong tun' ni-a kipanin note tawh ka om sungteng ka nasepna khempeuh note in na thei uh hi
Jew mite in kei hong thahsawmna hangin kiniamkhiatna leh khitui naptui tawh haksapi-in Topa' na ka sem hi
Mihon lak ahi a, note' innsungah ahi zongin ka hong thuhilhna khempeuhah note' phattuamna ding a om khempeuh sit neiloin kong gen khin hi
Jew mi leh Gentail mite a mawhna panun Pasian' lamah kihei-in i Topa Jesuh a upna dingun thu ka gen khinzo hi
Tu-in ahih leh Kha Siangtho' hong sawlna mangin, kei tungah bang thu hong piang ding hiam, cih theilopi-in Jerusalem khua-ah a pai ding ka hi hi
Thongkiatna leh gimna ka thuakna ding thu bekbek, ka omna khua khempeuhah Kha Siangtho in hong gen tawntung hi

Ahi zongin Topa Jesuh in kei sep dingin a hong piak, Pasian hehpihna hangin Lungdamna Thu, mite kiangah gen ding nasep ka tangtut zawh nak leh kei nuntakna-ah bangbang hong piang ta leh a thupi-in ka ngaihsun kei hi
“A beisa hunah Pasian' Ukna thu a hilhin note lakah kong vak kawikawi a, ahi zongin tu-in kuamah in nong muhkik nawnloh ding uh ka thei hi
Tua ahih ciangin tuni mahmahin note tungah limtakin kong gennop thu in: Note khat peuhpeuh Pasian tawh kikhenin siatna na tuah uh leh kei' tavuan hi nawnlo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh note tungah Pasian' thu kong genloh khat zong om nawnlo hi
Kha Siangtho in note' khutsungah a hong koih pawlpi mite leh nomau pumpi mahmah limtakin na kem un. Pasian in a Tapa a sihna tawh a ngah a pawlpi hoihtakin a kemte na hi ta un
Kei ka om nawnloh ciangin, sa gilote in gannote a phialgawp bangin, mi pawlkhat in thu um mite hong phialgawp ding lamtak ka thei hi
Note sung mahmah panin zong mi pawlkhat in thu um mite khemin a zolkhiat hun hong tung ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin limtakin kiging un la, kum thum sung tawntung khitui naptui tawh note khempeuh ka hong thuhilhna na ciamteh un
“Tu-in Pasian' khutsung leh ama dikna thu sungah note ka hong ap hi. Amah in note hong khangtosak thei-in, ama mite khempeuh-a' dingin a koih thuphate note tungah hong pia thei hi
Kuama neihsa, ngun, kham, leh puante en' dingin ka ngaihsun ngei kei hi
Kei leh ka kithuahpihte' kisapna khempeuh ka ngahtheihna dingin keima khut mahmah tawh na ka sepna thu note in na thei uh hi

Topa Jesuh mahmah in, ‘Ngahna sangin piak khiatna-ah lungdamna lianzaw hi,’ a cihna phawkkawmin nakpi takin nasepna tawh na khempeuhah a zawngkhalte huh ding hi hang, ci-in note kiangah kong lak khinzo hi,” ci-in a vaikhak hi
Paul in hih bangin a kam vaikhak a man khit ciangin a vekpi-un khukdin' uh a, Paul in thu a ngen hi
Amaute a kikhen dingin mangpha a kikhak uh ciangin khatlekhat kilen kikawi-in a kap uh hi
Paul in, “Kuamah in nong mukik nawn kei ding uh hi,” a cihna hangin a dah mahmah uh hi. Amaute in teembaw tung ciangdong Paul a hong kha uh hi.
